summary: Integration and unit tests for App covering view switching, loading states, error auto-clear, refresh/summarize flows, filter-aware commands, and status bar rendering

observations.text: setupTestStore creates a real SQLite database in t.TempDir() — tests exercise storage integration, not mocks. mockRefreshSvc and mockSummarizeSvc are the only mocks.

Tests directly manipulate App struct fields (app.loading, app.dashboard.filter, app.channels.channels) to set up preconditions rather than simulating full message flows — relies on the value-type App being freely copyable.

TestApp_AutoRefreshIgnoresFilter verifies that autoRefreshTickMsg triggers refreshCmd (RefreshAll), NOT refreshFilteredCmd — documenting the intentional behavioral difference between auto and manual refresh.
